blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,196 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
